Store dimension-reduction results in DESeq2 object

Source: R/rnaseq.r
add_dim_reduct.Rd

Calculate dimension reduction

Usage

add_dim_reduct(dds, n = Inf, family = "norm", batch = ~1)

Arguments

dds

The original DESeq2 object containing all samples

n
family
batch
spec

The analysis specificiation

Details

Add a vst transformed assay, and a projection of the samples ont PCA space

Author

Gavin Kelly

On this page

Developed by Gavin Kelly.
